_comment: Hot-reloaded by the executor every ~3s — edit live to control without restart. Copy to arb.config.json.
_borrow_note: MAX flash-loan size (USDC); the optimiser picks the best size up to this cap.
_tip_note: tip = tip_fraction_bps% of COMPUTED profit, clamped [1000, 80% of profit]. 3000 = 30%.
_min_profit_note: only co-bundle when predicted profit exceeds this (~$0.0015); must clear tip + fees.
